name: Creamy-Smooth Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hot water and horseradish. Allow to stand for 5-10 minutes, then drain well and set aside.
2. Heat the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Whisk in the flour and stir until bubbly.
4. Stir in the heated stock and milk. Continue stirring until thickened slightly.
5. Add sugar and salt. Heat for 5 minutes more.
6. Add horseradish, vinegar, and pepper. Simmer for 10-12 minutes.
7. Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream.
8. Serve warm, immediately.
